title: Topic Of The Week Measuring Volatility
section_path: Topic Of The Week Measuring Volatility
section_path_text: Topic Of The Week Measuring Volatility
summary:
Main
Volatility, stemmed from the Latin word, ‘Volatilis' which meant "fleeting, transitory, swift". Spot freight rates which can be literally impacted, influenced or distorted by a mix of physical fundamentals, technical corrections and irrational market sentiment certainty embodied this dangerous trait. In this topic, we will take a brief look at the physical price movements of the various vessel-size segments (C5TC / P5TC / S10TC).
